description: Evaluation sampling budgets used for non-LoBiFlow baseline rows in the efficiency tradeoff table.

semantics.TRADES: Selected denoising-step budget from strict baseline tuning.
semantics.CGAN: One generator evaluation; the sampler ignores iterative step count.
semantics.TimeCausalVAE: One prior-sample decoder evaluation; the sampler ignores iterative step count.
semantics.TimeGAN: One generator/recovery evaluation; the sampler ignores iterative step count.
semantics.KoVAE: One Koopman-prior decoder evaluation; the sampler ignores iterative step count.
